item.title: Reddit Sentiment Analysis Dashboard
item.description:
Welcome to the Reddit Sentiment Analysis Dashboard! This interactive dashboard provides a comprehensive analysis of sentiments expressed in Reddit posts related to cryptocurrency, coupled with the corresponding price trends.

Features

  1. Sentiment and Price Over Days: Track the sentiment scores of Reddit posts alongside cryptocurrency price movements over time.
  2. Number of Posts per Day: Visualize the volume of Reddit posts on a daily basis.
  3. Sentiment Distribution: Explore the distribution of sentiments among Reddit posts, categorized as Positive, Negative, or Neutral.
  4. Top Posts Sentiment: Discover the sentiment analysis of the top-rated Reddit posts, including their titles, upvotes, and sentiment scores.

To view the project live visit reddit-sent.onrender.com
